name: Celestial Nexus Toolkit
changes: Updated index.html metadata and release stamp to v1.6.0
Preserved hub-only module navigation and Discord allowance from previous patch
Preserved cargo contract title fix from previous patch
Preserved SCMDB-style Contract Finder tags, calculator inputs, requirements, combat breakdowns, cargo manifest, and source-field detail board
Added v1.6.0 README, changelog, manifest, service worker cache, checksum, package report, patch report, upload instructions, and cleanup guide
safe_delete_summary: After verifying v1.6.0 in production, archive or delete older one-off patch/upload/report files such as *_PATCH_UPLOAD.txt, old PATCH_REPORT.json, old PACKAGE_REPORT.json, old SHA256SUMS_PATCH.txt, and old upload instructions. Keep index.html, data/, assets/wikelo/, manifest.webmanifest, sw.js, icons, .nojekyll, and any workflow/scripts still in use.
